```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 -c "
from pathlib import Path
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, 'scripts')
from notes_content import split_frontmatter

files = '''adaptability.md associative-linking.md attention-to-detail.md build-a-reliable-default.md capture.md client-site-handoff.md coaching-ethics.md commonplace-book.md create-regular-connection.md deliberate-practice.md eliminate-before-managing.md expect-the-counter.md rollback-principle.md safety-by-design.md safety-comes-first.md sanctification.md second-order-thinking.md secret-devotion.md seek-the-kingdom-first.md self-control.md selling-static-sites.md servant-leadership.md set-calm-boundaries.md share-sheet.md share-what-you-learn.md ship-it.md signal-vs-noise.md situational-control.md sketchpad.md slow-productivity.md slow-the-moment.md spaced-repetition.md standard-operating-procedures.md staged-rollout.md static-site-client-scope.md stay-effective-in-new-conditions.md sunk-cost-fallacy.md sustainable-performance.md synthesis-as-a-goal.md systems-thinking.md take-up-your-cross.md taxonomy.md the-12-week-year.md the-beatitudes.md the-collectors-fallacy.md the-feynman-technique.md the-garage-concept.md the-golden-rule.md the-knowledge-lifecycle.md the-narrow-way.md the-second-brain-workflow.md the-trusted-inbox.md the-wise-builder.md there-is-no-perfect-solution.md tony-buzan.md treasure-in-heaven.md turn-the-other-cheek.md versatility.md voice-memos.md webhooks.md weekly-review-checklists.md wood-hay-stubble.md'''.split()

base = Path('content/english/notes')
for f in files:
    p = base / f
    if not p.exists():
        print(f'MISSING: {f}')
        continue
    fm, body = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    kc = fm.get('key_concept', '')
    line1 = kc.split('\n\n')[0].split('\n')[0].strip() if kc else ''
    desc = fm.get('description', '')
    print(f'=== {f} ===')
    print(f'DESC: {desc}')
    print(f'KC1: {line1}')
    print()
"

```

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 << 'PY'
import yaml
from pathlib import Path
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, 'scripts')
from notes_content import split_frontmatter

files = '''adaptability.md associative-linking.md attention-to-detail.md build-a-reliable-default.md capture.md client-site-handoff.md coaching-ethics.md commonplace-book.md create-regular-connection.md deliberate-practice.md eliminate-before-managing.md expect-the-counter.md rollback-principle.md safety-by-design.md safety-comes-first.md sanctification.md second-order-thinking.md secret-devotion.md seek-the-kingdom-first.md self-control.md selling-static-sites.md servant-leadership.md set-calm-boundaries.md share-sheet.md share-what-you-learn.md ship-it.md signal-vs-noise.md situational-control.md sketchpad.md slow-productivity.md slow-the-moment.md spaced-repetition.md standard-operating-procedures.md staged-rollout.md static-site-client-scope.md stay-effective-in-new-conditions.md sunk-cost-fallacy.md sustainable-performance.md synthesis-as-a-goal.md systems-thinking.md take-up-your-cross.md taxonomy.md the-12-week-year.md the-beatitudes.md the-collectors-fallacy.md the-feynman-technique.md the-garage-concept.md the-golden-rule.md the-knowledge-lifecycle.md the-narrow-way.md the-second-brain-workflow.md the-trusted-inbox.md the-wise-builder.md there-is-no-perfect-solution.md tony-buzan.md treasure-in-heaven.md turn-the-other-cheek.md versatility.md voice-memos.md webhooks.md weekly-review-checklists.md wood-hay-stubble.md'''.split()

base = Path('content/english/notes')
for f in files:
    p = base / f
    if not p.exists():
        print(f'MISSING: {f}')
        continue
    raw, body = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    fm = yaml.safe_load(raw) or {}
    kc = fm.get('key_concept', '') or ''
    line1 = kc.split('\n\n')[0].split('\n')[0].strip()
    desc = fm.get('description', '')
    same = desc.strip() == line1.strip()
    print(f'{f}|SAME={same}|DESC={desc}|KC1={line1}')
PY
```

```
adaptability.md|SAME=True|DESC=Keep the goal, swap the method when the ground moves.|KC1=Keep the goal, swap the method when the ground moves.
associative-linking.md|SAME=False|DESC=Folders sort. Links think. I link so notes meet without me remembering every filename. Faith parallel: [[Love Your Neighbor]] - neighbors in the graph; ideas linked by proximity and care, not only folder tree.|KC1=Folders sort.
attention-to-detail.md|SAME=False|DESC=The boring checks - diff review, edge cases, spelling in the customer email - that stop small misses from becoming big ones.|KC1=Attention to detail is catching the typo, edge case, and loose end before they become incidents.
build-a-reliable-default.md|SAME=False|DESC=When time, information, confidence, or energy runs short, you fall back on what's most practiced.|KC1=Make that fallback a simple, dependable response - rehearsed enough to run when thinking is thin.
capture.md|SAME=False|DESC=Save what resonates into one inbox I trust - then empty it weekly.|KC1=Friction kills capture.
client-site-handoff.md|SAME=False|DESC=Before deposit, I name who publishes next and price the handoff so launch isn't a guessing game.|KC1=Pick exactly one primary model with [[Plain Commitments at Work]] - not "we'll figure it out at launch."
coaching-ethics.md|SAME=False|DESC=Develop the person without hiding behind their consent when the drill is unsafe or pointless.|KC1=Consent doesn't erase the job when the drill is unsafe.
commonplace-book.md|SAME=True|DESC=A personal book of quotes and ideas worth keeping - ancestor of linked notes.|KC1=A personal book of quotes and ideas worth keeping - ancestor of linked notes.
create-regular-connection.md|SAME=False|DESC=I pick one small ritual and repeat it - ten minutes, one walk, one check-in - instead of waiting for a big gesture to make up for a dry month. Consistency tells people the relationship still has a slot on the calendar.|KC1=I pick one simple connection habit and repeat it - trust grows
… (output truncated)
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
capture.md is already done and will be skipped.

commonplace-book.md needs a rewrite because its description duplicates the key concept. All remaining files will get new descriptions following the jorap-voice rules.

Fourteen files are flagged for rewriting because their descriptions duplicate the key concept. associative-linking.md contains no bible references.

seek-the-kingdom-first.md, secret-devotion.md, the-narrow-way.md, the-golden-rule.md, treasure-in-heaven.md, turn-the-other-cheek.md, the-wise-builder.md, the-beatitudes.md, and wood-hay-stubble.md all need new descriptions. Their current text either duplicates the key concept or contains bible references.

All sixty-one remaining files will be rewritten. Several others contain wikilinks, bold formatting, or faith parallels that violate the jorap-voice rules. The goal is to produce sixty-one fresh descriptions following the plain-word, one-breath, no-bible-reference standard.

Several additional files already satisfy the jorap-voice rules and will be skipped: client-site-handoff.md, create-regular-connection.md, eliminate-before-managing.md, expect-the-counter.md, rollback-principle.md, selling-static-sites.md, set-calm-boundaries.md, signal-vs-noise.md, and static-site-client-scope.md. A Python script will generate and apply the remaining new descriptions.

sunk-cost-fallacy.md, the-knowledge-lifecycle.md, there-is-no-perfect-solution.md, and weekly-review-checklists.md were also identified as needing new descriptions.

Drafting has begun. The first two descriptions are being written now. adaptability.md will use a rain-and-court example. associative-linking.md will follow the key concept about folders sorting.

associative-linking.md now uses a graph-linking example. attention-to-detail.md catches typos before they become incidents. build-a-reliable-default.md uses a rehearsal fallback. client-site-handoff.md is already good and will be left unchanged.

coaching-ethics.md will warn against hiding behind consent when drills risk injury or bad lessons. deliberate-practice.md will describe drilling the weak slice with feedback until it holds. eliminate-before-managing.md, expect-the-counter.md, and rollback-principle.md are already good and will be left unchanged.

safety-by-design.md will describe building workflows so dangerous moves are hard to perform. safety-comes-first.md is already good but may be trimmed. sanctification.md will explain that God keeps shaping habits after declaring righteousness. second-order-thinking.md will ask what the clever fix triggers next.

secret-devotion.md will describe giving, praying, and fasting for God alone rather than for group-chat praise. seek-the-kingdom-first.md will place God’s rule above food, status, and tomorrow’s worry. self-control.md will state that the next move is chosen deliberately, not driven by urges. selling-static-sites.md and set-calm-boundaries.md are already good and will be left unchanged. servant-leadership.md will describe unblocking the team, coaching through the mess, taking blame upward, and passing credit downward. share-sheet.md is next.

share-sheet.md will describe the phone share menu as the fastest capture pipe away from the desk. share-what-you-learn.md will warn that hoarding know-how helps nobody. ship-it.md will push the good-enough version live instead of polishing until the deadline owns the work. situational-control.md will describe steering pace, format, and speakers in a room where the full outcome cannot be owned. sketchpad.md is next.

sketchpad.md will describe roughing out shapes on paper before anything public. slow-productivity.md will drop markdown and explain that fewer active projects turn notes into finished work instead of a guilt backlog. slow-the-moment.md will warn that urgency should not dictate the next move. spaced-repetition.md will describe reviewing facts on a schedule so they stick, using flashcards for recall rather than whole essays. standard-operating-procedures.md is next.

standard-operating-procedures.md will describe writing short deploy and incident steps so nobody improvises when the clock is loud. staged-rollout.md will ship to a small slice first so rollback stays cheap. stay-effective-in-new-conditions.md will warn that a habit that worked in one role can fail in another; the right move is retuning rather than clinging. sustainable-performance.md will aim for a pace that can be held next month without burning out or cutting safety corners. synthesis-as-a-goal.md is next.

synthesis-as-a-goal.md will describe merging sources into beliefs that can be defended, rejecting a quote pile as the goal. systems-thinking.md will trace loops behind problems so the process is fixed rather than patched. take-up-your-cross.md will frame following Christ daily as denying self and choosing his will over mine, not collecting suffering points. taxonomy.md will treat tags and folders as retrieval tools, not classification for its own sake. the-12-week-year.md is next.

the-12-week-year.md will describe compressing yearly goals into twelve-week arcs and mapping wiki projects to them. the-beatitudes.md will describe the eight blessings as a picture of who the kingdom favors. the-collectors-fallacy.md will warn that saving articles felt like progress until every save was tied to an express deadline or cut. the-feynman-technique.md will describe teaching the note out loud to a blank page and stopping wherever the explanation stumbles. the-garage-concept.md is next.

the-golden-rule.md will describe treating people with active care rather than merely avoiding harm. the-narrow-way.md will warn that the easy broad path is the one to avoid. the-second-brain-workflow.md will map the CODE and PARA loop across capture, organization, distillation, and weekly expression.

the-trusted-inbox.md will warn that an untrusted capture pipe causes ideas to be hoarded in the head. the-wise-builder.md will describe building on rock when Jesus’s words are actually obeyed. tony-buzan.md will contrast mind maps with argument order. treasure-in-heaven.md will warn that material things rust, moth, and thieves can steal.

turn-the-other-cheek.md will warn that returning the same blow breaks the retaliation loop. versatility.md will describe plugging into more than one lane when the team or client needs a shift. voice-memos.md will describe talking ideas into the phone while hands are on the wheel or stove. webhooks.md will explain that the server pings the app when something happens, pushing events instead of polling every minute. weekly-review-checklists.md and wood-hay-stubble.md are already good and will be left unchanged.

treasure-in-heaven.md will warn that worthless effort is lost, even if it survives Christ’s review. Files already written well will be skipped unless they contain bible references, wikilinks, faith parallels, or markdown formatting.
</details></think>

<summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com &amp;&amp; python3 &lt;&lt; &#39;PY&#39;
import re, yaml, sys
from pathlib import Path
sys.path.insert(0, &#39;scripts&#39;)
from notes_content import split_frontmatter

files = open(&#39;scripts/_batch-descriptions.py&#39;).read().split(&#39;DESCRIPTIONS: dict[str, str] = {&#39;)[1].split(&#39;}&#39;)[0]
import ast
# simpler: just re-read all from DESCRIPTIONS keys
exec(open(&#39;scripts/_batch-descriptions.py&#39;).read().split(&#39;def main&#39;)[0])
BOOKS = (
    r&#34;Matthew|Mark|Luke|John|Romans|Galatians|Ephesians|Philippians|Colossians|&#34;
    r&#34;1\s*(?:Cor|Tim|Pet|John|Sam|Kings|Chron)|2\s*(?:Cor|Tim|Pet|Sam|Kings|Chron)|&#34;
    r&#34;3\s*John|Hebrews|James|Jude|Revelation|Genesis|Exodus|Leviticus|Deuteronomy|&#34;
    r&#34;Psalm|Proverbs|Isaiah|Jeremiah|Acts|Timothy|Titus|Philemon|Peter|Deuteronomy&#34;
)
REF = rf&#34;(?:{BOOKS})\s+\d+:\d+&#34;
base = Path(&#39;content/english/notes&#39;)
errors = []
unchanged = []
for name in DESCRIPTIONS:
    p = base / name
    raw, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding=&#39;utf-8&#39;))
    fm = yaml.safe_load(raw) or {}
    desc = (fm.get(&#39;description&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).strip()
    kc = (fm.get(&#39;key_concept&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).strip()
    line1 = kc.split(&#39;\n\n&#39;)[0].split(&#39;\n&#39;)[0].strip()
    if desc == line1:
        errors.append(f&#39;SAME KC1: {name}&#39;)
    if re.search(REF, desc):
        errors.append(f&#39;BIBLE: {name}: {desc}&#39;)
    if desc != DESCRIPTIONS[name]:
        errors.append(f&#39;MISMATCH: {name}&#39;)
# capture skipped
p = base / &#39;capture.md&#39;
raw, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding=&#39;utf-8&#39;))
fm = yaml.safe_load(raw) or {}
print(&#39;capture desc:&#39;, fm.get(&#39;description&#39;))
print(&#39;errors:&#39;, errors or &#39;none&#39;)
print(&#39;processed:&#39;, len(DESCRIPTIONS), &#39;+ capture skipped&#39;)
PY</summary>
```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 << 'PY'
import re, yaml, sys
from pathlib import Path
sys.path.insert(0, 'scripts')
from notes_content import split_frontmatter

files = open('scripts/_batch-descriptions.py').read().split('DESCRIPTIONS: dict[str, str] = {')[1].split('}')[0]
import ast
# simpler: just re-read all from DESCRIPTIONS keys
exec(open('scripts/_batch-descriptions.py').read().split('def main')[0])
BOOKS = (
    r"Matthew|Mark|Luke|John|Romans|Galatians|Ephesians|Philippians|Colossians|"
    r"1\s*(?:Cor|Tim|Pet|John|Sam|Kings|Chron)|2\s*(?:Cor|Tim|Pet|Sam|Kings|Chron)|"
    r"3\s*John|Hebrews|James|Jude|Revelation|Genesis|Exodus|Leviticus|Deuteronomy|"
    r"Psalm|Proverbs|Isaiah|Jeremiah|Acts|Timothy|Titus|Philemon|Peter|Deuteronomy"
)
REF = rf"(?:{BOOKS})\s+\d+:\d+"
base = Path('content/english/notes')
errors = []
unchanged = []
for name in DESCRIPTIONS:
    p = base / name
    raw, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    fm = yaml.safe_load(raw) or {}
    desc = (fm.get('description') or '').strip()
    kc = (fm.get('key_concept') or '').strip()
    line1 = kc.split('\n\n')[0].split('\n')[0].strip()
    if desc == line1:
        errors.append(f'SAME KC1: {name}')
    if re.search(REF, desc):
        errors.append(f'BIBLE: {name}: {desc}')
    if desc != DESCRIPTIONS[name]:
        errors.append(f'MISMATCH: {name}')
# capture skipped
p = base / 'capture.md'
raw, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
fm = yaml.safe_load(raw) or {}
print('capture desc:', fm.get('description'))
print('errors:', errors or 'none')
print('processed:', len(DESCRIPTIONS), '+ capture skipped')
PY
```

BOOKS = (
    r&#34;Matthew|Mark|Luke|John|Romans|Galatians|Ephesians|Philippians|Colossians|&#34;
    r&#34;1\s*(?:Cor|Tim|Pet|John|Sam|Kings|Chron)|2\s*(?:Cor|Tim|Pet|Sam|Kings|Chron)|&#34;
    r&#34;3\s*John|Hebrews|James|Jude|Revelation|Genesis|Exodus|Leviticus|Deuteronomy|&#34;
    r&#34;Psalm|Proverbs|Isaiah|Jeremiah|Acts|Timothy|Titus|Philemon|Peter|Deuteronomy&#34;
)

base = Path(&#39;content/english/notes&#39;)
errors = []
for name in files:
    p = base / name
    if not p.exists():
        errors.append(f&#39;MISSING: {name}&#39;)
        continue
    raw, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding=&#39;utf-8&#39;))
    fm = yaml.safe_load(raw) or {}
    desc = (fm.get(&#39;description&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).strip()
    kc = (fm.get(&#39;key_concept&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).strip()
    line1 = kc.split(&#39;\n\n&#39;)[0].split(&#39;\n&#39;)[0].strip()
    if desc == line1:
        errors.append(f&#39;SAME KC1: {name}&#39;)
    if re.search(REF, desc):
        errors.append(f&#39;BIBLE: {name}&#39;)
print(&#39;errors:&#39;, errors or &#39;none&#39;)
PY</summary>
```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 << 'PY'
import re, yaml, sys
from pathlib import Path
sys.path.insert(0, 'scripts')
from notes_content import split_frontmatter

files = '''adaptability.md associative-linking.md attention-to-detail.md build-a-reliable-default.md capture.md client-site-handoff.md coaching-ethics.md commonplace-book.md create-regular-connection.md deliberate-practice.md eliminate-before-managing.md expect-the-counter.md rollback-principle.md safety-by-design.md safety-comes-first.md sanctification.md second-order-thinking.md secret-devotion.md seek-the-kingdom-first.md self-control.md selling-static-sites.md servant-leadership.md set-calm-boundaries.md share-sheet.md share-what-you-learn.md ship-it.md signal-vs-noise.md situational-control.md sketchpad.md slow-productivity.md slow-the-moment.md spaced-repetition.md standard-operating-procedures.md staged-rollout.md static-site-client-scope.md stay-effective-in-new-conditions.md sunk-cost-fallacy.md sustainable-performance.md synthesis-as-a-goal.md systems-thinking.md take-up-your-cross.md taxonomy.md the-12-week-year.md the-beatitudes.md the-collectors-fallacy.md the-feynman-technique.md the-garage-concept.md the-golden-rule.md the-knowledge-lifecycle.md the-narrow-way.md the-second-brain-workflow.md the-trusted-inbox.md the-wise-builder.md there-is-no-perfect-solution.md tony-buzan.md treasure-in-heaven.md turn-the-other-cheek.md versatility.md voice-memos.md webhooks.md weekly-review-checklists.md wood-hay-stubble.md'''.split()

BOOKS = (
    r"Matthew|Mark|Luke|John|Romans|Galatians|Ephesians|Philippians|Colossians|"
    r"1\s*(?:Cor|Tim|Pet|John|Sam|Kings|Chron)|2\s*(?:Cor|Tim|Pet|Sam|Kings|Chron)|"
    r"3\s*John|Hebrews|James|Jude|Revelation|Genesis|Exodus|Leviticus|Deuteronomy|"
    r"Psalm|Proverbs|Isaiah|Jeremiah|Acts|Timothy|Titus|Philemon|Peter|Deuteronomy"
)
REF = rf"(?:{BOOKS})\s+\d+:\d+"
base = Path('content/english/notes')
errors = []
for name in files:
    p = base / name
    if not p.exists():
        errors.append(f'MISSING: {name}')
        continue
    raw, _ = split_frontmatter(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    fm = yaml.safe_load(raw) or {}
    desc = (fm.get('description') or '').strip()
    kc = (fm.get('key_concept') or '').strip()
    line1 = kc.split('\n\n')[0].split('\n')[0].strip()
    if desc == line1:
        errors.append(f'SAME KC1: {name}')
    if re.search(REF, desc):
        errors.append(f'BIBLE: {name}')
print('errors:', errors or 'none')
PY
```
